audit_items.proof_trace: Property holds: all transaction types (Legacy, EIP-2930, EIP-1559, EIP-4844, EIP-7702) uniformly expose gas_limit via the same trait method, and the check `tx.gas_limit() > MAX_TX_GAS_LIMIT_OSAKA` is applied identically in both transaction pool validation (eth.rs:491-498) and block body validation (validation.rs:159-170) without type-specific exceptions.
